# coolify_teams (Data Source)

Use this data source to list all Coolify teams.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "coolify_teams" "all" {}

output "team_names" {
  value = [for t in data.coolify_teams.all.teams : t.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `filter` (Block Set) Filter results by field values. Multiple filters are ANDed together. Multiple values within a filter are ORed. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--filter))

### Read-Only

- `teams` (Attributes List) The list of teams. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--teams))

<a id="nestedblock--filter"></a>
### Nested Schema for `filter`

Required:

- `name` (String) The field name to filter by.
- `values` (Set of String) The values to match against. Multiple values are ORed.


<a id="nestedatt--teams"></a>
### Nested Schema for `teams`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) The description of the team.
- `id` (Number) The numeric ID of the team.
- `name` (String) The name of the team.
